title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at iGate India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
iGate India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
